revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:五條天神社]]
'''Gojō Tenjin Shrine''' (五條天神社 or 五条天神社) refers to Shinto shrines. As religious corporations, there are two entities: one registered as "五條天神社" and another as "五条天神社."
* {{ill|Gojō Tenjin Shrine (Taitō-ku)|ja|五條天神社 (台東区)|1=Gojo Tenjin Shrine (Tokyo)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjin Shrine (Taitō-ku)|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojo Tenjin Shrine (Tokyo)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ueno Park|en|Ueno Park|qid=Q746216|lt=Ueno Park|1=Ueno Park}}, {{ill|Taitō|en|Taitō|qid=Q232641|lt=Taitō, Tokyo|1=Taitō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. * {{ill|Gojō Tenjin-gū|ja|五條天神社 (京都市)|1=Gojō Tenjin-gū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjin-gū|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjin-gū|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1077022|lt=Shimogyō-ku|1=Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its registered name as a religious corporation uses the modern form, "五条天神社."
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Gojō Castle Tenjin Shrine|ja|五城天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Castle Tenjin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504358}} - Located in Uchiko-chō, Kita District, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Gojōzan Tenjin Shrine|ja|五條山天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojōzan Tenjin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504364|1=Gojōzan Tenjin Shrine}} - Located in Akabanechō, Nara City, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Tenjin Shrine|ja|五霊天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Tenjin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504369|1=Goryō Tenjin Shrine}} - Located in Hanada-chō, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. The registered name as a religious corporation uses the traditional kanji, "五靈天神社." * {{ill|Tenjinsha|lt=Tenjinsha|lt=Tenjin Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|天神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjin Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天神社}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|五條天神社|version=101399011|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:五條天神社]]
<!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--><!--Gojō Tenjin Shrine--> [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] ==Merged second translation== '''Gojō Tenjinsha''' or '''Gojō Tenjinsha''' (五條天神社, 五条天神社) refers to two distinct {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. As religious corporations, one shrine uses the name "五條天神社," while the other uses "五条天神社."
* {{ill|Gojō Tenjinsha (Taitō Ward)|ja|五條天神社 (台東区)|1=Gojo Tenjin Shrine (Tokyo)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjinsha (Taitō Ward)|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojo Tenjin Shrine (Tokyo)|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Ueno Park|en|Ueno Park|qid=Q746216|lt=Ueno Park|1=Ueno Park}}, {{ill|Taitō|en|Taitō|qid=Q232641|lt=Taitō Ward|1=Taitō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. * {{ill|Gojō Tenjinsha (Kyoto City)|ja|五條天神社 (京都市)|1=Gojō Tenjin-gū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjinsha (Kyoto City)|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjin-gū|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1077022|lt=Shimogyō-ku|1=Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. Its registered religious corporation name uses the modern kanji "五条天神社."
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Gojō Tenjinsha (Ehime)|ja|五城天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō Tenjinsha (Ehime)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504358}} - A shrine located in Uchiko, Kitagun, Ehime Prefecture. * {{ill|Gojōzan Tenjinsha|ja|五條山天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojōzan Tenjinsha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504364|1=Gojōzan Tenjin Shrine}} - A shrine located in Akabanechō, Nara City, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Tenjinsha|ja|五霊天神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Tenjinsha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504369|1=Goryō Tenjin Shrine}} - A shrine located in Hanadachō, Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture. The registered religious corporation name uses the old kanji form "五靈天神社." * {{ill|Tenjinsha (disambiguation)|ja|天神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinsha (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天神社|1=Tenjinsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11443279}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|五條天神社|version=101399011|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:五條天神社]]
